title: Default-Style Halloween Pack
description: A Halloween Themed revamp of the Default Experience!
body:
![Halloween Pack Logo](https://i.imgur.com/gJ5XcAj.png)

---

This resource pack haunts your world with Halloween decor, while maintaining the default style. If you want the Autumn vibes without the spookiness of Halloween, try the **[Default-Style Fall Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-style-fall-pack)**!

**[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (or Optifine) RECOMMENDED!**

**What's Inside**:
- Autumn Foliage (similar to Default-Style Fall Pack)
- Mobs have dressed up in costumes (Illagers, Ravagers, Iron Golems, Pigs, Frogs and Cats!)
- Taiga Graveyards (Tombstones replace Tall Ferns)
- Halloween Themed Foods & Candy Dyes
- Spooky GUI

**Additional Credits**:
- Thanks to [Sixfootblue](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sixfootblue) for the Skeletal Dripleaf models & textures! Check out their original pack [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/skeletal-dripleaf).

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I410P9Q1)

![Images Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png)
![Halloween Mobs](https://i.imgur.com/MsP2T8e.png)
![Tombstones](https://i.imgur.com/memymvf.png)
![Candies](https://i.imgur.com/ONUUaPF.png)

![Pairings Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/rGi1bap.png)
Some resource packs and client-side mods that pair nicely with this resource pack!
- [Mod][Fabric] 🍂[Falling Leaves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric): adds gorgeous falling leaves that fits nicely with the fall theme.
- [Resource Pack] 🕸[Xali's Web](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xali-s-web/): replaces Glow Lichen with cobwebs! Spooky!
- [Resource Pack] 🔥[Halloween Netherite](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/halloween-netherite-pack/): makes Netherite tools spooky and Halloween themed!
- [Resource Pack] 👻[The Boo Bandits](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/the-boo-bandits-1-17-1-resource-pack-optifine/): replaces Ravagers with a fun gang of ghosts in a carriage! Make sure to put it above this pack in the pack selector to override the Clown Ravager (requires Optifine).
